name: cpig-fieldops-04-display-rep-cycle
description: Phase 1B last-row diagnostic + Phase 3 regression guard for per-field representation cycling. Creates a CPigGyroid (the trickiest case: structural intersection recipe with periodic SDF, exercises the rep dispatch on a non-trivial atom), selects it, and cycles _CPigDisplayRep through ALL 7 per-field reps: auto → tape → atlasBaked → procedural → mesh → pointCloud → companionTape → auto. WaitForPenumbraFrame after each cycle asserts a fresh frame presents. The cpig.rep.live NDJSON event (added Phase 1A) records every rep change with fieldId + new rep + previous rep so the diagnosis matrix can detect rep-change failures from outside Rhino. If any rep produces a blank or doesn't accept, the frame gate times out → test Crashed. Single capture per rep step (7 captures). Side-channel: cpig.rep.live per cycle step.

setup.vlmDescription: A 3D viewport with a ray-marched SDF surface rendered in some representation form — could be a smooth gyroid lattice, a box-clipped TPMS, a point cloud of surface samples, a polygon mesh approximation, or a wireframe AABB box. NOT an empty grey viewport.

checkpoints.name: cpig-fieldops-rep-after-cycle
checkpoints.description: Final state after cycling through all 7 per-field representations on a gyroid — back to auto (the start of the cycle).
